title: Perm、Perm Krai — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Perm、Perm Krai的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Perm是Perm Krai的一个城市，人口约1,050,000。A major city on the Kama River in the Urals, known for its oil refining, aerospace industry, and vibrant contemporary art scene.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
